debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
e : Expression p
ae : AffineExpression p
⊢ some ae = AffineExpression.ofExpression? p e → AffineExpression.eval p ae = e.eval

      have h1 : v1.eval env = (Expression.eval e1) env := by
        simpa [hv1] using congrArg (fun o => (Option.getD o (by simp) |> fun _ => True)) (rfl : some v1 = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1)
      have h1' : v1.eval = (Expression.eval e1) := by
        apply ih1
        simpa [hv1]
      have h2' : v2.eval = (Expression.eval e2) := by
        apply ih2
        simpa [hv2]
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, h1', h2']

      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h

        simpa [hv1]
      have h2 : v2.eval = (Expression.eval e2) := by
        apply ih2
        simpa [hv2]
      have : some ae = mul? v1 v2 := by
        simpa [hv1, hv2] using h
      cases hconst1 : v1.toConstant? <;> cases hconst2 : v2.toConstant?
      · simp [mul?, hconst1, hconst2] at this
      · cases n2

      · cases n1
        simp [mul?, hconst1, hconst2] at this
      · cases n1

intro h
  funext env
  revert ae
  induction e with
  | const n =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval] at h ⊢
      cases h
      simp [Expression.eval, AffineExpression.eval]
  | var x =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval] at h ⊢
      cases h
      simp [Expression.eval, AffineExpression.eval]
  | add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      cases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 <;> cases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 <;>
        simp [h1, h2] at h
      · cases h
        have he1 : v = v_1 := by
          have : some v = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 := by simpa [h1]
          exact Option.some.inj this
        have he2 : v_1 = v_2 := by
          have : some v_1 = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 := by simpa [h2]
          exact Option.some.inj this
        subst he1; subst he2
        simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, Add.add, instAdd, AffineExpression.eval, ih1, ih2, h1, h2]
      · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h
  | mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      cases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 <;> cases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 <;>
        simp [h1, h2] at h
      · cases v.toConstant? <;> cases v_1.toConstant? <;> simp [mul?, AffineExpression.toConstant?] at h
        · cases h
          have hv1 : ae = mul_by_number v_1 val := by rfl
          subst hv1
          have he1 : some { offset := val, affine := v.affine } = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 := by
            simpa [h1]
          have he2 : some v_1 = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 := by
            simpa [h2]
          have E1 := ih1 _ (Option.some.inj he1 ▸ rfl)
          have E2 := ih2 _ (Option.some.inj he2 ▸ rfl)
          simp [mul_by_number, AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, E1, E2]
        · cases h
          have hv2 : ae = mul_by_number v val := by rfl
          subst hv2
          have he1 : some v = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 := by simpa [h1]
          have he2 : some { offset := val, affine := v_1.affine } = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 := by
            simpa [h2]
          have E1 := ih1 _ (Option.some.inj he1 ▸ rfl)
          have E2 := ih2 _ (Option.some.inj he2 ▸ rfl)
          simp [mul_by_number, AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, E1, E2]
      · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h

      rcases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 with _ | a1 <;>
      rcases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 with _ | a2 <;>
      simp [h1, h2] at h
      · cases h
        simp [Expression.eval, AffineExpression.eval, ih1 _ rfl, ih2 _ rfl]
      · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h
  | mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      rcases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 with _ | a1 <;>
      rcases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 with _ | a2 <;>
      simp [h1, h2] at h
      ·
        dsimp [mul?] at h
        simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?] at h
        rcases ha1 : a1.affine.isEmpty with rfl | ha1 <;>
        rcases ha2 : a2.affine.isEmpty with rfl | ha2 <;>
        simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?, ha1, ha2] at h
        · cases h
          simp [Expression.eval, AffineExpression.eval, ih1 _ rfl, ih2 _ rfl, mul_by_number]
        · cases h
          simp [Expression.eval, AffineExpression.eval, ih1 _ rfl, ih2 _ rfl, mul_by_number]
        · cases h
        · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h

intro h
  have : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e = some ae := by simpa [eq_comm] using h
  cases e <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval] at this ⊢

intro h
  cases e <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval] at h ⊢
  · cases h; rfl
  · cases h; funext env; simp [AffineExpression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl]
  · rename_i e1 e2
    cases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 <;>
    cases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, h1, h2] at h
    · cases h; rfl
  · rename_i e1 e2

    cases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, h1, h2] at h
    · cases h; rfl

intro h
  funext env
  revert ae
  induction e with
  | const n =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      cases h
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, AffineExpression.ofExpression?]
  | var x =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      cases h
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, AffineExpression.ofExpression?]
  | add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      rcases h with ⟨v1, hv1, v2, hv2, rfl⟩
      have h1 : v1.eval env = e1.eval env := by
        have := congrArg (fun t => Option.getD t ⟨0, Std.TreeMap.empty⟩) hv1
        exact ih1 _ hv1 env
      have h2 : v2.eval env = e2.eval env := by
        exact ih2 _ hv2 env
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, h1, h2]
  | mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      rcases h with ⟨v1, hv1, v2, hv2, hmul⟩
      have h1 : v1.eval env = e1.eval env := ih1 _ hv1 env
      have h2 : v2.eval env = e2.eval env := ih2 _ hv2 env
      have : some ae = mul? v1 v2 := by simpa [hmul] using hmul
      -- analyze mul?
      unfold mul? at this
      simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?] at this
      cases hcv1 : v1.toConstant? <;> cases hcv2 : v2.toConstant? <;> simp [hcv1, hcv2] at this
      · cases this
        -- v1 constant
        cases hcv1' : v1.affine.isEmpty <;> simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?, hcv1'] at hcv1
      · cases this
        -- v1 constant
        cases hcv1' : v1.affine.isEmpty <;> simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?, hcv1'] at hcv1
      · cases this
        -- v2 constant
        cases hcv2' : v2.affine.isEmpty <;> simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?, hcv2'] at hcv2
      · cases this
        -- v2 constant
        cases hcv2' : v2.affine.isEmpty <;> simp [AffineExpression.toConstant?, hcv2'] at hcv2

intro h
  cases e <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h ⊢

    · cases h

  · rename_i e1 e2
    cases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 <;>
    cases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, h1, h2] at h
    · rcases a.toConstant? <;> rcases a_1.toConstant? <;> simp [mul?, mul_by_number] at h
      · cases h
        ext env
        simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, mul_add, add_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
      · cases h

intro h

  · cases h

  · cases h

    · cases h

  · rename_i e1 e2
    cases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 <;>
    cases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, h1, h2] at h
    · rename_i v1 v2
      unfold mul? at h

intro h
  funext env
  induction e generalizing ae with
  | const n =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval] at h ⊢
      cases h
      simp [Expression.eval, AffineExpression.eval]
  | var x =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval] at h ⊢
      cases h
      simp [Expression.eval, AffineExpression.eval]
  | add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      rcases h with ⟨v1, hv1, v2, hv2, rfl⟩
      have h1 : v1.eval env = e1.eval env := by
        have := ih1 v1 hv1
        simpa using congrArg (fun f => f env) this
      have h2 : v2.eval env = e2.eval env := by
        have := ih2 v2 hv2
        simpa using congrArg (fun f => f env) this
      simp [Expression.eval, AffineExpression.eval, Add.add, instAdd, h1, h2]
  | mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, mul?] at h
      rcases h with ⟨v1, hv1, v2, hv2, hm⟩
      have h1 : v1.eval env = e1.eval env := by
        have := ih1 v1 hv1
        simpa using congrArg (fun f => f env) this
      have h2 : v2.eval env = e2.eval env := by
        have := ih2 v2 hv2
        simpa using congrArg (fun f => f env) this
      cases hvc1 : v1.toConstant? with
      | some n1 =>
          simp [mul?, hvc1] at hm
          cases hm
          simp [mul_by_number, AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, h1, h2, AffineExpression.toConstant?, hvc1]
      | none =>
          cases hvc2 : v2.toConstant? with
          | some n2 =>
              simp [mul?, hvc1, hvc2] at hm
              cases hm
              simp [mul_by_number, AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, h1, h2, AffineExpression.toConstant?, hvc2]
          | none =>
              simp [mul?, hvc1, hvc2] at hm

intro h
  funext env
  induction e generalizing ae with
  | const n =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval] at h ⊢
      simpa using congrArg (fun (x : AffineExpression p) => x.offset) (Option.some.inj h)
  | var x =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval] at h ⊢
      have : ae =
          { offset := (0 : ZMod p), affine := (Std.TreeMap.empty).insert x (1 : ZMod p) } :=
        Option.some.inj h
      subst this
      simp [AffineExpression.eval]
  | add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      rcases h with ⟨ae1, h1, ae2, h2, rfl⟩
      have he1 : ae1.eval env = e1.eval env := by
        simpa using congrArg (fun f => f env) (ih1 ae1 (by simpa [h1]))
      have he2 : ae2.eval env = e2.eval env := by
        simpa using congrArg (fun f => f env) (ih2 ae2 (by simpa [h2]))
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, he1, he2, HAdd.hAdd, instAdd] 
  | mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      rcases h with ⟨ae1, h1, ae2, h2, hm⟩
      have he1 : ae1.eval env = e1.eval env := by
        simpa using congrArg (fun f => f env) (ih1 ae1 (by simpa [h1]))
      have he2 : ae2.eval env = e2.eval env := by
        simpa using congrArg (fun f => f env) (ih2 ae2 (by simpa [h2]))
      have hm' : some ae = mul? ae1 ae2 := by simpa [h1, h2] using hm
      cases hconst1 : ae1.toConstant? <;> cases hconst2 : ae2.toConstant? <;> simp [mul?, hconst1, hconst2] at hm'
      · cases hm'
      · cases hm'
      · cases hm'
      · cases hm'

intro h
  revert ae

      rcases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 with _ | ae1 <;>
      rcases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 with _ | ae2 <;>
      simp [h1, h2] at h
      · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h
        have he1 : ae1.eval = e1.eval := ih1 ae1 (by simpa [h1])
        have he2 : ae2.eval = e2.eval := ih2 ae2 (by simpa [h2])
        ext env

  | mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      intro ae h

      rcases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 with _ | ae1 <;>
      rcases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 with _ | ae2 <;>
      simp [h1, h2] at h
      · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h
      ·
        have he1 : ae1.eval = e1.eval := ih1 ae1 (by simpa [h1])
        have he2 : ae2.eval = e2.eval := ih2 ae2 (by simpa [h2])
        dsimp [mul?] at h
        cases hconst1 : ae1.toConstant? <;> cases hconst2 : ae2.toConstant? <;> simp [hconst1, hconst2] at h
        · cases h
        · cases h
        · cases h
          ext env
          simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, he1, he2, mul_by_number, AffineExpression.toConstant?] at *
        · cases h
          ext env
          simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, he1, he2, mul_by_number, AffineExpression.toConstant?] at *

  cases e <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h

intro h
  ext env
  revert ae
  induction e with
  | const n =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval] at h ⊢
      cases h
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval]
  | var x =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval] at h ⊢
      cases h
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, Std.TreeMap.foldl, Std.TreeMap.empty]
  | add e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      cases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 <;> cases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 <;> simp [h1, h2] at h
      · cases h
        have he1 : v.eval = (e1.eval) := by
          have := ih1 v (by simpa [h1])
          exact congrArg (fun f => f env) this
        have he2 : v_1.eval = (e2.eval) := by
          have := ih2 v_1 (by simpa [h2])
          exact congrArg (fun f => f env) this
        simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, he1, he2]
      · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h
  | mul e1 e2 ih1 ih2 =>
      intro ae h
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
      cases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e1 <;> cases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? e2 <;> simp [h1, h2] at h
      · dsimp [mul?] at h
        cases hc1 : v.toConstant? <;> cases hc2 : v_1.toConstant? <;> simp [hc1, hc2] at h
        · cases h
          have hv1 : v.eval = (e1.eval) := by
            have := ih1 v (by simpa [h1])
            exact congrArg (fun f => f env) this
          have hv2 : v_1.eval = (e2.eval) := by
            have := ih2 v_1 (by simpa [h2])
            exact congrArg (fun f => f env) this
          have hc1' : v.eval env = n := by
            simpa [AffineExpression.toConstant?, AffineExpression.eval] using congrArg (fun o => Option.getD o 0) (by simpa [hc1] using rfl)
          simp [mul_by_number, AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, hv2, hc1', mul_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
        · cases h
          have hv1 : v.eval = (e1.eval) := by
            have := ih1 v (by simpa [h1])
            exact congrArg (fun f => f env) this
          have hv2 : v_1.eval = (e2.eval) := by
            have := ih2 v_1 (by simpa [h2])
            exact congrArg (fun f => f env) this
          have hc2' : v_1.eval env = n := by
            simpa [AffineExpression.toConstant?, AffineExpression.eval] using congrArg (fun o => Option.getD o 0) (by simpa [hc2] using rfl)
          simp [mul_by_number, AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, hv1, hc2', mul_assoc, mul_add, add_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]
        · cases h
        · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h
      · cases h

intro h
  cases e <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h

intro h
  cases e <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
  · cases h
    ext env

  · cases h

  · rename_i e1 e2
    simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
    rcases h with ⟨ae1, h1, ae2, h2, rfl⟩
    have ih1 := ofExpression_correct p e1 ae1 (by simpa using h1)
    have ih2 := ofExpression_correct p e2 ae2 (by simpa using h2)
    ext env
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, ih1, ih2, Add.add]
  · rename_i e1 e2
    simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?] at h
    rcases h with ⟨ae1, h1, ae2, h2, hm⟩
    have ih1 := ofExpression_correct p e1 ae1 (by simpa using h1)
    have ih2 := ofExpression_correct p e2 ae2 (by simpa using h2)
    rcases hconst1 : ae1.toConstant? with n1 <;> rcases hconst2 : ae2.toConstant? with n2
    · simp [mul?, hconst1, hconst2] at hm
    · cases hm
      ext env
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, mul_by_number, ih1, ih2, AffineExpression.toConstant?, hconst1, hconst2, AffineExpression.eval]
    · cases hm
      ext env
      simp [AffineExpression.eval, Expression.eval, mul_by_number, ih1, ih2, AffineExpression.toConstant?, hconst1, hconst2, AffineExpression.eval]
    · simp [mul?, hconst1, hconst2] at hm

intro h
  cases e <;> simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.toConstant?, mul?, mul_by_number, AffineExpression.eval] at h ⊢
  · cases h
    rfl
  · cases h
    rfl
  ·
    cases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? _ <;> cases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? _ <;>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, h1, h2] at h
  ·
    cases h1 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? _ <;> cases h2 : AffineExpression.ofExpression? _ <;>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, h1, h2] at h
